tr.3-phase-power: Calculates real power in a industrial 3-phase AC system.
tr.beam-deflection: Predicts the vertical displacement of a beam under uniform load.
tr.belt-drive: Open belt drive analysis for flat and V-belt transmissions.
tr.bend-allowance: Calculates the flat blank length for precision sheet metal bending.
tr.bending-moment: Advanced calculation for bending moment within the Alucalc OS suite.
tr.biology-genetics: Mathematical model for predicting genetic variation in populations under equilibrium.
tr.bolt-torque: Determines the required torque to produce a specific clamp force while overcoming friction.
tr.centripetal-force: The force necessary to keep an object moving in a curved path.
tr.chemical-molarity: Measures the concentration of a chemical species in a solution.
tr.column-buckling: Calculates the axial load limit before lateral instability occurs.
tr.concrete-reinforcement: Calculates the required reinforcement steel for concrete structural elements according to limit state design.
tr.failure-diagnosis: Probabilistic framework for diagnosing mechanical failures based on multi-sensor input and symptom telemetry.
tr.failure-prediction: Uses statistical models and AI patterns to predict the Remaining Useful Life (RUL) of mechanical components.
tr.gear-contact-stress: Advanced calculation for gear contact stress within the Alucalc OS suite.
tr.gear-module: Fundamental gear size parameter defining pitch and geometry.
tr.gear-ratio: Defines the speed/torque transformation between gears.
tr.heat-transfer-conduction: Fourier's Law for heat transfer through solid materials.
tr.hooke-law: Relates the force exerted by a spring to its displacement from equilibrium.
tr.ideal-gas-law: Equation of state for a hypothetical ideal gas.
tr.kinetic-energy: Calculates the energy an object possesses due to its motion.
tr.lift-coefficient: Calculates the lift force generated by an airfoil or wing surface.
tr.machine-assembly: Geometric and dimensional analysis for complex mechanical assemblies and fit-up sequences.
tr.machining-time: Calculates production time for CNC lathe operations.
tr.naval-hydrostatics: Analysis of ship stability and buoyancy including transverse/longitudinal metacentric height calculations.
tr.newton-second-law: The fundamental law of motion relating force, mass, and acceleration.
tr.ohms-law: Fundamental relationship between potential difference, flow, and combined resistance/reactance.
tr.physics-solver: Multi-physics engine for solving complex kinematic, dynamic, and electrodynamic differential equations.
tr.pressure-drop: Darcy-Weisbach equation for energy loss in piping systems.
tr.pumps: Calculates pump head, power requirements, and cavitation risks (NPSH) for industrial fluid systems.
tr.radioactive-decay: Calculates the remaining quantity of a radioactive substance over time.
tr.reducer-lubrication: Calculates the thermal capacity and lubrication requirements for industrial gear reducers.
tr.reynolds-number: A dimensionless number used to characterize the flow regime (Laminar vs Turbulent).
tr.rocket-equation: Calculates the maximum change in velocity a rocket can achieve.
tr.roller-chain-drive: Industrial chain drive analysis for heavy load transmission.
tr.simulation-fea: Numerical analysis for structural stress distribution, thermal gradients, and modal frequencies.
tr.specific-gravity: Ratio of the density of a substance to the density of water at 4°C.
tr.thermal-expansion: Calculates the dimensional change due to temperature variation.
tr.thread-stripping-area: Advanced calculation for thread stripping area within the Alucalc OS suite.
tr.timing-belt-design: Synchronous power transmission design focusing on precise positioning and load distribution.
tr.tolerance-stackup: RSS (Root Sum Squares) analysis for assembly fit-up.
tr.topology-optimization: Mathematics of material distribution to optimize stiffness while minimizing mass for 3D printing and advanced casting.
tr.transformer-calculation: Basic induction-based voltage and current scaling.
tr.truss-analysis: Analysis of pinned structures where members only carry axial loads.
tr.v-belt-power: Determines friction-based power transmission capacity for mechanical drives.
tr.voltage-drop: Calculates the voltage loss across long electrical transmission lines to ensure equipment voltage stability.

zh.reynolds-number: A dimensionless number used to characterize the flow regime (Laminar vs Turbulent).
zh.rocket-equation: Calculates the maximum change in velocity a rocket can achieve.
zh.roller-chain-drive: Industrial chain drive analysis for heavy load transmission.
zh.simulation-fea: Numerical analysis for structural stress distribution, thermal gradients, and modal frequencies.
zh.specific-gravity: Ratio of the density of a substance to the density of water at 4°C.
zh.thermal-expansion: Calculates the dimensional change due to temperature variation.
zh.thread-stripping-area: Advanced calculation for thread stripping area within the Alucalc OS suite.
zh.timing-belt-design: Synchronous power transmission design focusing on precise positioning and load distribution.
zh.tolerance-stackup: RSS (Root Sum Squares) analysis for assembly fit-up.
zh.topology-optimization: Mathematics of material distribution to optimize stiffness while minimizing mass for 3D printing and advanced casting.
zh.transformer-calculation: Basic induction-based voltage and current scaling.
zh.truss-analysis: Analysis of pinned structures where members only carry axial loads.
zh.v-belt-power: Determines friction-based power transmission capacity for mechanical drives.
zh.voltage-drop: Calculates the voltage loss across long electrical transmission lines to ensure equipment voltage stability.

ja.3-phase-power: Calculates real power in a industrial 3-phase AC system.
ja.beam-deflection: Predicts the vertical displacement of a beam under uniform load.
ja.belt-drive: Open belt drive analysis for flat and V-belt transmissions.
ja.bend-allowance: Calculates the flat blank length for precision sheet metal bending.
ja.bending-moment: Advanced calculation for bending moment within the Alucalc OS suite.
ja.biology-genetics: Mathematical model for predicting genetic variation in populations under equilibrium.
ja.bolt-torque: Determines the required torque to produce a specific clamp force while overcoming friction.
ja.centripetal-force: The force necessary to keep an object moving in a curved path.
ja.chemical-molarity: Measures the concentration of a chemical species in a solution.
ja.column-buckling: Calculates the axial load limit before lateral instability occurs.
ja.concrete-reinforcement: Calculates the required reinforcement steel for concrete structural elements according to limit state design.
ja.failure-diagnosis: Probabilistic framework for diagnosing mechanical failures based on multi-sensor input and symptom telemetry.
ja.failure-prediction: Uses statistical models and AI patterns to predict the Remaining Useful Life (RUL) of mechanical components.
ja.gear-contact-stress: Advanced calculation for gear contact stress within the Alucalc OS suite.
ja.gear-module: Fundamental gear size parameter defining pitch and geometry.
ja.gear-ratio: Defines the speed/torque transformation between gears.
ja.heat-transfer-conduction: Fourier's Law for heat transfer through solid materials.
ja.hooke-law: Relates the force exerted by a spring to its displacement from equilibrium.
ja.ideal-gas-law: Equation of state for a hypothetical ideal gas.
ja.kinetic-energy: Calculates the energy an object possesses due to its motion.
ja.lift-coefficient: Calculates the lift force generated by an airfoil or wing surface.
ja.machine-assembly: Geometric and dimensional analysis for complex mechanical assemblies and fit-up sequences.
ja.machining-time: Calculates production time for CNC lathe operations.
ja.naval-hydrostatics: Analysis of ship stability and buoyancy including transverse/longitudinal metacentric height calculations.
ja.newton-second-law: The fundamental law of motion relating force, mass, and acceleration.
ja.ohms-law: Fundamental relationship between potential difference, flow, and combined resistance/reactance.
ja.physics-solver: Multi-physics engine for solving complex kinematic, dynamic, and electrodynamic differential equations.
ja.pressure-drop: Darcy-Weisbach equation for energy loss in piping systems.
ja.pumps: Calculates pump head, power requirements, and cavitation risks (NPSH) for industrial fluid systems.
ja.radioactive-decay: Calculates the remaining quantity of a radioactive substance over time.
ja.reducer-lubrication: Calculates the thermal capacity and lubrication requirements for industrial gear reducers.
ja.reynolds-number: A dimensionless number used to characterize the flow regime (Laminar vs Turbulent).

ja.thermal-expansion: Calculates the dimensional change due to temperature variation.
